name: galaxy-online-iii
description: MMO de estrategia espacial 4X inspirado en los clásicos del género

scripts.build: cd packages/database && npx prisma generate && cd ../../apps/api && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.start: cd packages/database && npx prisma migrate deploy && cd ../../apps/api && npm start
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/database && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd packages/database && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd packages/database && npx prisma db seed
